sql_prompt_rules: Use only metadata-backed Oracle tables, columns, and join paths.
Apply business-safe filters and keep joins minimal for claim analytics intent.
Return executable SQL statements with FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY and no semicolon.
time_expression_guidance: When request explicitly contains a period/date scope, express it with bind variables.
Use metadata-consistent date columns and avoid inventing non-existent period fields.
